post.description: Administrator login. Returns authorization cookie required for all protected endpoints.

schema.example: auth=ey...qY; Path=/; Expires=Fri, 04 Apr 2025 14:35:37 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict

post.description: Logout and delete authorization cookie

get.description: Whether the current user is logged in.

Reports whether an API key has been generated. The key itself is
only returned once at creation time (POST), never on subsequent
reads.

post.summary: Generate or rotate the API key
post.description:
Generates a fresh API key, replacing any existing one. The
returned key is shown only once; store it immediately.

Even when the request is authenticated via API key (Bearer), the
admin password must be supplied in the request body to prevent a
leaked key from rotating itself. The password check is skipped
when the server is started with `--disable-auth`.

key.description: The new API key (cleartext, shown once).

post.description: Prevent home battery discharge during vehicle fast charging.
Allow the home battery to discharge to the grid (experimental).
Charge home battery from grid when price or emissions are below the threshold. Uses price if a dynamic tariff exists. Uses emissions if a CO₂-tariff is configured. Ignored otherwise.

delete.description: Default evcc control behavior is restored

post.description: Directly controls the mode of all controllable batteries. evcc behavior like 'price limit' or 'prevent discharge while fast charging' is overruled. External mode resets after 60s. The external system has to call this endpoint regularly.
Set battery buffer SoC.
Set battery buffer start SoC.

Enable or disable battery boost. When active, the maximum available home battery power is added until the home battery is drained to configured SoC limit. Note: boost will not work while the battery is on hold (e.g. during fast charging or planned charging with discharge prevention enabled).
Set the SoC limit for battery boost. Home battery will be used to support charging up to this SoC level. A value of 100 (default) disabled the boost feature in UI and API.
Delay before charging stops in solar mode.
Specifies the grid draw power to stop charging in solar mode.
Delay before charging starts in solar mode.
Specifies the available surplus power to start charging in solar mode.
Updates the energy limit of the loadpoint. Only available for guest vehicles and vehicles with unknown SoC. Limit is removed on vehicle disconnect.
Sets the session SoC limit. Cleared on disconnect. Takes precedence over the vehicle's configured limit while set; once cleared (set to 0), the vehicle limit applies again.
Updates the maximum current of the loadpoint.
Updates the minimum current of the loadpoint.
Sets the minimum temperature for heating devices. The device is heated as fast as possible while below this value. Set to 0 to disable.
Changes the charging behavior of the loadpoint.

Updates the allowed phases of the loadpoint. Selects the desired phase mode for chargers with automatic phase switching. For manual phase switching chargers (via cable or Lasttrennschalter) this value tells evcc the actual phases.

400.description: Invalid phases-value. You have most likely entered the value 0 for a wallbox that cannot switch phases automatically.

get.description: Returns the current charging plan for this loadpoint.

delete.description: Delete charging plan. Only available when a vehicle without SoC is connected.

post.description: Create charging plan with fixed time and energy target. Only available when a vehicle without SoC is connected.

get.description: Simulate repeating charging plan and return the result. Does not alter the actual charging plan.
Simulate charging plan based on SoC goal. Does not alter the actual charging plan.
Simulate charging plan based on energy goal. Does not alter the actual charging plan.

post.description: Updates the charging plan strategy for the loadpoint.
Set loadpoint priority.

delete.description: Delete cost or emission limit for fast-charging with grid energy.

post.description: Set cost or emission limit for fast-charging with grid energy.

delete.description: Delete limit for feed-in priority optimization.

post.description: Set limit for feed-in priority optimization.

delete.description: Remove vehicle from loadpoint. Connected vehicle is treated as guest vehicle.

patch.description: Starts the automatic vehicle detection process.

post.description: Assigns vehicle to loadpoint.
Set battery priority SoC.
Set grid connection operating point.
Adjust the solar forecast to real production data of the current day.

delete.summary: Remove smart feed-in priority limit for all loadpoints.
delete.description: Convenience method to remove limit for all loadpoints at once. Value is applied to each individual loadpoint.

post.summary: Set smart feed-in priority limit for all loadpoints
post.description: Convenience method to set smart feed-in priority limit for all loadpoints at once. Value is applied to each individual loadpoint.

put.description: Update vehicle, loadpoint or odometer of a charging session. Only provided fields are changed; a null odometer clears the stored value.

get.description: Returns a list of HEMS grid limitation events.
Returns a list of charging sessions.

post.description: Enable or disable telemetry. Note: Telemetry requires sponsorship.

delete.summary: Remove smart charging cost limit for all loadpoints.
delete.description: Convenience method to remove limit for all loadpoints at once. Value is applied to each individual loadpoint.

post.summary: Set smart charging cost limit for all loadpoints
post.description: Convenience method to set smart charging cost limit for all loadpoints at once. Value is applied to each individual loadpoint.

get.description: Returns the complete state of the system. This structure is used by the UI and also published via websocket and MQTT. It can be filtered by JQ to only return a subset of the data. Note: the response mirrors the internal UI state and carries no compatibility promise. Fields may change or disappear between releases.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of log lines to return

get.description: Returns a list of all log areas (e.g. `lp-1`, `site`, `db`).

delete.description: Clears all cached data. This resets all cached values from tariffs, vehicle APIs, and other components that use caching.

post.description: Shut down instance. There is no reboot command. We expect the underlying system (docker, systemd, etc.) to restart the evcc instance once it's terminated.

get.description: Returns the prices or emission values for the upcoming hours

post.description: Charging will stop when this SoC is reached.
Vehicle will be fast-charged until this SoC is reached.

delete.description: Resets the vehicle charge mode to keep the last selected mode.

post.description: Sets the charge mode applied when this vehicle becomes active on a loadpoint.
Updates the repeating charging plan.
Create charging plan with fixed time and SoC target.
Updates the charging plan strategy for the vehicle.

get.description: Downloads the SQLite database as a backup file. Session users must supply the admin password in the X-Admin-Password header. API key holders via Bearer token are exempt.

post.description: Restores the database from a previously downloaded backup file. Session users must supply the admin password in the X-Admin-Password header. API key holders via Bearer token are exempt. The instance restarts after a successful restore.

Selectively deletes sessions and/or settings from the database. Session users must supply the admin password in the X-Admin-Password header. API key holders via Bearer token are exempt. The instance restarts after a successful reset.

settings.description: Delete all settings, configs, and meters

get.description: Returns aggregated energy history data. Aggregate granularity defaults to 15 minutes. Supports CSV export.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language for CSV column headers (BCP 47, e.g. de, en). Defaults to Accept-Language header.

meterStart.description: Meter reading at start of charging session

meterStop.description: Meter reading at end of charging session

items.description: 0: Sunday, 1: Monday, 2: Tuesday, 3: Wednesday, 4: Thursday, 5: Friday, 6: Saturday

Rate.description: A time slot with an associated price or emission value.

value.description: Price per kWh in the configured currency or emissions in g/kWh.

StaticEnergyPlan.description: Charging plan with an energy goal.

precondition.description: Duration of uninterrupted charging directly before the target time, in seconds.

ChargerStatusReason.description: Reason why the charger is waiting.

PhaseAction.description: Pending phase switching action in solar mode.

PvAction.description: Pending charge start or stop action in solar mode.

LoadpointSuggestion.description: Battery optimizer suggestion for a loadpoint.

actionable.description: Suggestion differs from the current operating mode.

LoadpointUi.description: Display-only UI settings of a loadpoint.

minTemp.description: Lower bound of the temperature scale for heating devices, in degrees.

maxTemp.description: Upper bound of the temperature scale for heating devices, in degrees.

Loadpoint.description: A charging location with a charger, an optional dedicated meter and an optional vehicle.

name.description: Unique loadpoint identifier used in API routes and configuration.

batteryBoost.description: Battery boost is active. When enabled, home battery power is used for fast charging.

chargeCurrents.description: Charging current per phase in A.

chargeDuration.description: Duration of the current charging session in seconds.

chargeRemainingDuration.description: Estimated remaining charging time in seconds.

chargeTotalImport.description: Total energy imported by the charge meter in kWh.

chargeVoltages.description: Charging voltage per phase in V.

chargedEnergy.description: Energy charged in the current charging session in kWh.

chargerFeatureAutodetectDisabled.description: The connected vehicle is not identified automatically by its status.

chargerFeatureClimaterDisabled.description: The climater state of the connected vehicle is ignored for charge control.

chargerFeatureCoarseCurrent.description: Charger only supports full ampere steps for current control.

chargerFeatureContinuous.description: Charger is a heating device where disabled means normal operation.

chargerFeatureHeating.description: Charger is a heating device. SoC values represent temperature in degrees.

chargerFeatureIntegratedDevice.description: Charger is an always-connected device without vehicles and charging sessions, like a heat pump.

chargerFeatureOffline.description: The connected vehicle only provides data while charging.

chargerFeatureRetryable.description: Vehicle API calls are retried on failure.

chargerFeatureStreaming.description: The connected vehicle pushes data updates instead of being polled.

chargerFeatureSwitchDevice.description: Charger is a switchable device without current control, like a heat pump or switch socket.

chargerFeatureWakeUpDisabled.description: No wake-up calls are sent to the connected vehicle.

chargerFeatureWelcomeCharge.description: The connected vehicle may need a short welcome charge to start communicating.

chargerIcon.description: Charger icon name for UI display.

chargerPhases1p3p.description: Charger supports automatic switching between 1-phase and 3-phase charging.

chargerSinglePhase.description: Charger is physically connected with a single phase.

chargerStatusReason.description: Reason why the charger is waiting, like a pending authorization or a required disconnect.

charging.description: A vehicle is connected and charging.

connected.description: A vehicle is connected to the charger.

connectedDuration.description: Duration since the vehicle was connected, in seconds.

disableDelay.description: Delay before charging stops in solar mode, in seconds.

disableThreshold.description: Grid draw power above which charging stops in solar mode, in W.

effectiveMaxCurrent.description: Currently applied maximum charging current in A.

effectiveMinCurrent.description: Currently applied minimum charging current in A.

effectivePlanId.description: Id of the currently applied charging plan. Zero if no plan is active.

effectivePlanSoc.description: SoC goal in % of the currently applied charging plan.

effectivePlanTime.description: Target time of the currently applied charging plan.

enableDelay.description: Delay before charging starts in solar mode, in seconds.

enableThreshold.description: Available surplus power above which charging starts in solar mode, in W.

enabled.description: Charger is currently allowed to charge.

limitEnergy.description: Session energy limit in kWh. Zero means no limit.

limitSoc.description: Session SoC limit in %. Zero means no limit.

minSoc.description: Minimum SoC in %. Vehicle is fast-charged until this level is reached.

minSocNotReached.description: Vehicle SoC is below the configured minimum SoC.

offeredCurrent.description: Current offered to the vehicle in A.

phaseAction.description: Pending phase switching action in solar mode.

phaseRemaining.description: Remaining time until the pending phase switching action executes, in seconds.

phasesActive.description: Number of phases expected to be used for charging.

phasesConfigured.description: Configured phase mode. 0 is automatic switching, 1 and 3 select a fixed phase count.

plan.description: Time slots of the current charging plan.

planActive.description: The current time slot is an active charging slot of the plan.

planEnergy.description: Energy goal of the charging plan in kWh.

planOverrun.description: Duration in seconds the charging plan is projected to miss its target time.

planProjectedEnd.description: Projected end of the charging plan. End of the last planned slot.

planProjectedStart.description: Projected start of the charging plan. Start of the earliest planned slot.

planTime.description: Target time of the charging plan.

priority.description: Priority for surplus distribution. Higher number means higher priority.

pvAction.description: Pending charge start or stop action in solar mode.

pvRemaining.description: Remaining time until the pending charge start or stop action executes, in seconds.

sessionCo2PerKWh.description: Average CO₂ emissions of the current charging session in g/kWh.

sessionEnergy.description: Energy charged in the current charging session in kWh.

sessionPrice.description: Total cost of the current charging session in the configured currency.

sessionPricePerKWh.description: Average energy price of the current charging session per kWh in the configured currency.

sessionSolarPercentage.description: Share of solar energy in the current charging session in %.

smartCostActive.description: Fast charging with cheap or clean grid energy is currently active.

smartCostLimit.description: Price or emission limit for fast charging with grid energy.

smartCostNextStart.description: Start of the next fast charging period with cheap or clean grid energy.

smartFeedInPriorityActive.description: Charging pause for prioritized feed-in is currently active.

smartFeedInPriorityLimit.description: Feed-in rate limit above which charging is paused.

smartFeedInPriorityNextStart.description: Start of the next charging pause for prioritized feed-in.

suggestion.description: Charging suggestion from the battery optimizer.

vehicleClimaterActive.description: Climater of the connected vehicle is active.

vehicleLimitSoc.description: SoC limit configured in the vehicle itself, in %.

vehicleName.description: Unique name of the connected vehicle. Empty for guest vehicles.

vehicleOdometer.description: Odometer reading of the connected vehicle in km.

vehicleRange.description: Range of the connected vehicle in km.

vehicleSoc.description: Charge level of the connected vehicle in %. Temperature in degrees for heating devices.

vehicleTitle.description: Title of the connected vehicle for UI display.

vehicleWelcomeActive.description: A short welcome charge is active to enable vehicle communication.

batteryBoostLimit.description: SoC limit for battery boost in %.

ForecastSlot.description: A forecast value for a time slot.

value.description: Forecast value of the time slot. Unit depends on the forecast type.

EnergyByDay.description: Expected solar production energy of a day.

complete.description: Forecast data covers the whole day.

TimeseriesEntry.description: A forecast value at a point in time.

scale.description: Correction factor applied to the forecast based on past production.

dayAfterTomorrow.description: Expected production the day after tomorrow.

Forecast.description: Price, CO₂ and solar production forecasts.

grid.description: Grid price forecast. Price per kWh in the configured currency per time slot.

co2.description: CO₂ emission forecast in g/kWh per time slot.

planner.description: Charging cost forecast used by the plan optimizer per time slot.

feedin.description: Feed-in rate forecast. Rate per kWh in the configured currency per time slot.

class.description: Device class the error originates from, like meter or charger.

device.description: Name of the device that caused the error.

AuthProviders.description: Status of configured vehicle authentication providers, keyed by provider name.

BatterySuggestion.description: Battery optimizer suggestion for a home battery.

actionable.description: Suggestion differs from the current operating mode.

BatteryMeter.description: Measurement data of a single home battery meter.

name.description: Unique device name of the meter.

icon.description: Meter icon name for UI display.

controllable.description: Battery supports external control of its operation mode.

capacity.description: Battery capacity in kWh. Zero when not specified.

BatteryForecastPoint.description: A projected home battery charge level at a point in time.

time.description: Time of the projected charge level.

limit.description: The projection hits the upper or lower battery limit.

BatteryForecast.description: Projected home battery charge levels based on the solar and price forecast.

Battery.description: Home battery state. Aggregated across all battery meters.

power.description: Current battery power in W. Positive means discharging, negative means charging.

soc.description: Charge level in %. Weighted by capacity across all batteries.

forecast.description: Projected charge levels based on the solar and price forecast.

Meter.description: Measurement data of a single meter.

name.description: Unique device name of the meter.

icon.description: Meter icon name for UI display.

GenericConfigStatus.description: Configuration and runtime status of an integration. Structure depends on configuration.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

topic.description: Root topic all values are published under.

configured.description: A home energy management system is configured.

HemsStatus.description: Current external limits imposed by the home energy management system.

curtailed.description: Allowed feed-in in %. Values below 100 mean production is curtailed.

maxConsumptionPower.description: Maximum allowed consumption power in W.

maxProductionPower.description: Maximum allowed production power in W.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

expiresAt.description: Expiry time of the sponsor token.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

private.description: Private key in PEM format. Redacted.

uri.description: URI the EEBus service listens on.

port.description: Port the EEBus service listens on.

interfaces.description: Network interfaces the EEBus service uses.

ski.description: SKI (subject key identifier) used for pairing.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

connected.description: Connection to the remote access server is established.

loginBlocked.description: Remote login attempts are currently blocked by the rate limiter.

lastSeen.description: Last remote activity per client, keyed by username. RFC3339 timestamps.

Remote.description: Remote access configuration and connection status.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

ModbusProxyReadonly.description: How the Modbus proxy handles write requests.

ModbusProxySettings.description: Connection settings of a Modbus device.

ModbusProxy.description: A Modbus proxy forwarding requests to a physical device.

settings.description: Connection settings of the physical device.

disabled.description: Notifications for this event are disabled.

MessagingEvents.description: Configured notification messages, keyed by event type.

Circuit.description: A load management circuit limiting power and current of its assigned loadpoints.

icon.description: Circuit icon name for UI display.

SmartCostType.description: Type of the smart charging limit.

DeviceColorEntry.description: Color assigned to a device for consistent UI display.

StaticSocPlan.description: Charging plan with a SoC goal.

StaticPlan.description: Charging plan with a fixed target time and a SoC or energy goal.

weekdays.description: Weekdays the plan is active. 0 is Sunday, 6 is Saturday.

tz.description: Time zone of the target time, like Europe/Berlin.

name.description: Unique vehicle name used in API routes and configuration.

mode.description: Charge mode applied when the vehicle connects.

minSoc.description: Minimum SoC in %. Vehicle is fast-charged until this level is reached.

limitSoc.description: SoC limit in %. Charging stops when reached.

plan.description: Charging plan with a fixed target time and SoC or energy goal.

features.description: Feature flags of the vehicle implementation.

icon.description: Vehicle icon name for UI display.

StatisticsData.description: Aggregated charging statistics for a time period.

avgPrice.description: Average energy price per kWh in the configured currency.

Statistics.description: Charging statistics, keyed by time period.

port.description: Port the OCPP server listens on.

OcppConnectionStatus.description: Connection status of an OCPP station.

OcppStationStatus.description: Connection status of an OCPP station.

externalUrl.description: Externally reachable URL of the OCPP server.

OcppForwarderRule.description: A rule forwarding an OCPP station to an upstream backend.

upstreamUrl.description: URL of the upstream OCPP backend.

upstreamStationId.description: Station id used towards the upstream backend.

readOnly.description: Only forward read operations to the station.

OcppForwarderSession.description: Connection status of an OCPP forwarder rule.

upstreamUrl.description: URL of the upstream OCPP backend.

upstreamConnected.description: Connection to the upstream backend is established.

OcppForwarder.description: OCPP forwarder rules and upstream connection status.

yamlSource.description: Source of the configuration, evcc.yaml file or database.

State.description: Complete system state as returned by /api/state and pushed via websocket and MQTT. This structure mirrors the internal UI state and carries no compatibility promise. Fields may change or disappear between releases.

apiReady.description: HTTP API is ready to accept requests.

loadpoints.description: Charging locations. One entry per configured loadpoint.

forecast.description: Price, CO₂ and solar production forecasts.

currency.description: Configured currency for all monetary values.

authProviders.description: Status of configured vehicle authentication providers, keyed by provider name.

timezone.description: Server time zone abbreviation and UTC offset.

batteryMode.description: Current operation mode of the home battery.

pv.description: Solar generation meters. One entry per configured pv meter.

pvPower.description: Total solar generation power in W. Sum of all pv meters.

pvEnergy.description: Total solar generation energy in kWh.

aux.description: Auxiliary consumption meters. Their power is treated as available for charging.

auxPower.description: Total power of all auxiliary meters in W.

consumers.description: Consumption meters of individual devices for monitoring purposes.

residualPower.description: Configured grid operating point in W. Positive values maintain grid import.

greenShareHome.description: Share of green energy in home consumption, between 0 and 1.

greenShareLoadpoints.description: Share of green energy used for charging, between 0 and 1.

tariffs.description: Configured tariffs. Structure depends on configuration.

tariffGrid.description: Current grid energy price per kWh in the configured currency.

tariffFeedIn.description: Current feed-in rate per kWh in the configured currency.

tariffCo2.description: Current grid CO₂ emissions in g/kWh.

tariffSolar.description: Current cost of solar generation per kWh in the configured currency.

tariffPriceHome.description: Current energy price of home consumption per kWh, taking the green energy share into account.

tariffPriceLoadpoints.description: Current energy price of charging per kWh, taking the green energy share into account.

tariffCo2Home.description: Current CO₂ emissions of home consumption in g/kWh, taking the green energy share into account.

tariffCo2Loadpoints.description: Current CO₂ emissions of charging in g/kWh, taking the green energy share into account.

remote.description: Remote access configuration and connection status.

messaging.description: Messaging services configuration. Structure depends on configuration.

messagingEvents.description: Configured notification messages per event type.

interval.description: Update interval of the control loop in seconds.

circuits.description: Load management circuits, keyed by circuit name.

bufferSoc.description: Battery buffer SoC in %. Energy above this level may be used for charging in solar mode.

prioritySoc.description: Battery priority SoC in %. Home battery is charged first while below this level.

bufferStartSoc.description: Battery buffer start SoC in %. Solar charging starts automatically above this level.

batteryDischargeControl.description: Home battery discharge is prevented during fast charging and planned charging.

batteryGridDischarge.description: Home battery is allowed to discharge to the grid (experimental).

batteryGridChargeLimit.description: Price or emission limit for charging the home battery from grid.

batteryGridChargeActive.description: Home battery is currently charged from grid.

smartCostAvailable.description: A dynamic grid price or CO₂ forecast is configured.

smartCostType.description: Type of the smart charging limit, price based or emission based.

smartFeedInPriorityAvailable.description: A feed-in tariff with forecast is configured.

historyUpdated.description: Time of the last energy history update.

deviceColors.description: Colors assigned to devices for consistent UI display.

vehicles.description: Configured vehicles, keyed by vehicle name.

statistics.description: Charging statistics over different time periods.

config.description: Path of the evcc configuration file.

ocpp.description: OCPP server configuration and connected stations.

ocppforwarder.description: OCPP forwarder rules and upstream connection status.

adminPassword.name: X-Admin-Password
adminPassword.description: Admin password (required for session auth, not needed for API key)

costLimit.name: cost
costLimit.description: Cost limit in configured currency (default EUR) or CO2 limit in g/kWh

result.description: Battery mode. 0: unknown, 1: normal, 2: hold, 3: charge, 4: holdcharge

bearerAuth.description:
Long-lived API key (prefixed `evcc_`, managed via /auth/apikey).
Grants access to /api/db/* without requiring the X-Admin-Password header.
